required_features.name: Nanite
required_features.purpose: high-detail rocks, canyon walls, raft hard-surface props, debris, and scanned geometry

required_features.name: Lumen
required_features.purpose: dynamic canyon, forest, weather, and time-of-day lighting

required_features.name: Virtual Shadow Maps
required_features.purpose: stable high-resolution shadows for water corridors and dense vegetation

required_features.name: World Partition
required_features.purpose: stream long river corridors and real-world sections

required_features.name: PCG
required_features.purpose: author riverbank foliage, rocks, driftwood, gravel bars, foam cues, and hazards

required_features.name: Niagara
required_features.purpose: spray, mist, foam bursts, paddle splashes, rain, droplets, and rescue effects

required_features.name: SubstrateMaterialLayering
required_features.purpose: wet rubber, wet rock, aerated water, mud, PFDs, helmets, and seasonal surfaces

required_features.name: OpenXR
required_features.purpose: VR support across compatible desktop headsets

evaluate_features.name: NaniteFoliage
evaluate_features.purpose: dense riverbank vegetation after GPU, wind, collision, and VR cost checks

evaluate_features.name: MeshTerrain
evaluate_features.purpose: complex river corridors, overhangs, undercut banks, boulders, and cave-like formations

evaluate_features.name: ProceduralVegetationEditor
evaluate_features.purpose: large-scale biome authoring for seasonal riverbanks

evaluate_features.name: FastGeometryStreaming
evaluate_features.purpose: far-field scenery and non-gameplay canyon detail

notes: Water System is enabled for visual surfaces and authoring support; it is not authoritative physics.
Chaos remains incidental and non-authoritative for raft/water behavior.
Editor-created binary assets should be generated after this text manifest is reviewed in UE 5.8.
